name: e.l.f. Beauty, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview e.l.f. Beauty, Inc. (e.l.f. Beauty and together with our subsidiaries, the Company, or we) is a multi-brand beauty company that offers inclusive, accessible, clean, vegan and cruelty free cosmetics and skin care products. Our Vision . To be a different kind of beauty company by building brands that disrupt industry norms, shape culture and connect communities through positivity, inclusivity and accessibility.
